title: MatchEvent
description: One row per in-match timeline entry (goal, assist, own_goal, yellow/red card, substitution, apparatus_score, lane_time, penalty). Belongs to Tenant + Match (CASCADE). Optionally references Athlete + a related Athlete (assist points at the scorer). NEVER carries application_id, region_id, organization_id, or scope_node_id.

id.description: Prefixed ULID: `mev_<26>`. (Note the ULID prefix `mev_` collides with marketing's marketing_event prefix — the two live in different tables so there is no lookup ambiguity; distinct table names disambiguate.)

minute.description: In-match minute (0-based). 0 = pre-kickoff; 90+ for extra-time; use stoppage for injury time inside a period.

stoppage.description: Stoppage-time offset within the current minute. `minute=45 stoppage=3` renders as `45+3'`.

type.description: Enum: goal / assist / own_goal / yellow_card / red_card / substitution / apparatus_score / lane_time / penalty_awarded / penalty_scored / penalty_missed / timeout.

athlete_id.description: Primary athlete for the event (scorer for goal, sent-off player for red_card, substituted-off for substitution). NULL for team-level events (timeout, opponent goal without named scorer).

related_athlete_id.description: Secondary athlete (scorer for an assist; substituted-on player for a substitution). Only meaningful for pairing event types.

metadata.description: Event-specific fields. Shape: { assist_type: 'through_ball' } for assist; { card_reason: 'reckless_challenge' } for cards; { off_athlete_enrollment_id, on_athlete_enrollment_id } for substitution; { lane: 4, split_seconds: [...] } for lane_time; { apparatus: 'floor', total: 14.2 } for apparatus_score.

x-invariants: type='goal' + type='own_goal' + type='penalty_scored' require athlete_id IS NOT NULL
type IN ('yellow_card', 'red_card') require athlete_id IS NOT NULL
type='assist' requires related_athlete_id IS NOT NULL AND athlete_id IS NOT NULL AND athlete_id <> related_athlete_id
type='substitution' requires athlete_id IS NOT NULL AND related_athlete_id IS NOT NULL AND athlete_id <> related_athlete_id
athlete_id when set must belong to the match's squad (match_squad_entries.match_id=this.match_id AND athlete_id=this.athlete_id)
related_athlete_id when set must satisfy the same squad-membership rule
type + match_id + minute + stoppage IMMUTABLE post-create — corrections drop + recreate
